goal: Native scheduler hardening, real cooperative green threads, channel yield semantics, and stronger GC ownership validation
new_in_2_9_7: spawn(fn) creates real cooperative native tasks instead of only returning a counter
yield() saves the current task and round-robin switches to the next runnable task
recv(ch) on an empty channel implicitly yields when another runnable task exists
native scheduler implementation split into mellowrt_scheduler.c/.h
GC stats now expose heap_bytes, heap_blocks, last_freed_blocks, and last_freed_bytes
channel queue values clone through the VM heap ownership path
native tests cover task interleaving, implicit channel yield, nested ownership invariants, and repeated GC stress
runtime_notes: gc_stats()["mode"] remains mark-sweep-native-handles while heap value ownership is hardened
green threads are cooperative and explicit-yield based in v2.9.7
full preemptive or OS-backed M:N scheduling is still future runtime-engine work
runtime_policy: Native C is the release-authoritative runtime for v2.9.7 core work
default C execution must fail fast when native support is missing
release and CI validation should include native-only execution plus sanitizer/fuzzer gates
